column5: Policy Context & Regulatory Regime
Early Royal Decree 436/2004 framework
Introduction of highly generous RD 661/2007
Massive solar bubble explosion; capacity caps exceeded
Emergency caps introduced under RD 1578/2008
First retroactive cuts to operating hours (RD 14/2010)
Tariff deficit continues to climb heavily
Moratorium on new renewable applications (RDL 1/2012)
Transition period to dismantle Feed-in Tariffs
RD 413/2014 replaces tariffs with 'Reasonable Return' (7.4%)
Introduction of the restrictive 'Sun Tax' (RD 900/2015)
Stagnation of domestic deployment
First large-scale auctions under new economic regime
Repeal of the Sun Tax in late October
Grid connection boom for 2017 utility auction wins
New REER auction framework established
NextGenerationEU funds deploy via PRTR for self-consumption
Peak PRTR grant spending on residential/industrial rooftop solar
Extension of regional PRTR budget programs
Phasing down of explicit PRTR capital grants
Transitioning completely to merchant and REER pricing models
